testcase.name: test_put_data_in_indexeddb

failure.message: AssertionError: 'foo' should contain value 'yay', but contains 'None' instead assert None == 'yay'

testcase.failure:
self = <seletools.tests.test_indexeddb.TestIndexedDB object at 0x106dc3890>
def test_put_data_in_indexeddb(self): self.idb.put_value("keyvaluepairs", "foo", "yay") value = self.idb.get_value("keyvaluepairs", "foo") > assert ( value == "yay" ), f"'foo' should contain value 'yay', but contains '{value}' instead" E AssertionError: 'foo' should contain value 'yay', but contains 'None' instead E assert None == 'yay'
seletools/tests/test_indexeddb.py:21: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_add_data_into_indexeddb

failure.message: AssertionError: 'win' should contain value 'war', but contains 'None' instead assert None == 'war'

testcase.failure:
self = <seletools.tests.test_indexeddb.TestIndexedDB object at 0x106e055b0>
def test_add_data_into_indexeddb(self): self.idb.add_value("keyvaluepairs", "win", "war") value = self.idb.get_value("keyvaluepairs", "win") > assert ( value == "war" ), f"'win' should contain value 'war', but contains '{value}' instead" E AssertionError: 'win' should contain value 'war', but contains 'None' instead E assert None == 'war'
seletools/tests/test_indexeddb.py:28: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_remove_data_from_indexeddb

failure.message: AssertionError: 'foo' should return undefined, but contains 'None' instead assert None == 'undefined'

testcase.failure:
self = <seletools.tests.test_indexeddb.TestIndexedDB object at 0x106e056e0>
def test_remove_data_from_indexeddb(self): self.idb.remove_item("keyvaluepairs", "foo") value = self.idb.get_value("keyvaluepairs", "foo") > assert ( value == "undefined" ), f"'foo' should return undefined, but contains '{value}' instead" E AssertionError: 'foo' should return undefined, but contains 'None' instead E assert None == 'undefined'
seletools/tests/test_indexeddb.py:35: AssertionError
